name: energy_recall_notice_arrives_marrowbridge_rig_utl
premise: A regional manager wants an exception to policy; compliance says any carve-out must be written, time-limited, and auditable. In Energy, the situation tagged internally around energy recall notice arrives marrowbridge rig utl has converged with local pressure in the Marrowbridge corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Insurance and indemnity clauses disagree on who pays if an aggressive intervention misfires; nobody wants to be the named approver. Key facts are still arriving from the field; the team is working off stale dashboards and verbal handoffs. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. No option cleanly satisfies both rights and utility; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Nadia Rahman
agents.identity: I am Nadia Rahman, the accountable executive on this bridge in Energy. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat utility as disposable collateral every time rights spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Nadia Park
agents.identity: I am Nadia Park, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Energy. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so rights cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes utility in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will impose a narrow, time-boxed intervention with human override, subgroup checks, and a hard stop if harm rises—accepting slower relief to protect utility.
I will authorize a broad immediate action to stabilize outcomes now, with post-hoc measurement and correction—accepting elevated risk to utility to secure rights before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Nadia Rahman must choose under rights versus utility. What does Nadia Rahman do?
